(function(){
'use strict';
// AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate-stealth-evasions.ts
// Source: puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth@2.11.2 evasions
// Do not edit manually — re-run the generator after updating stealth plugin.
//
// This file is loaded via page.addInitScript() BEFORE any page script.
// It patches navigator, window, chrome, WebGL, etc. to make headless
// Chromium look like a real Chrome browser to bot-detection systems
// (Aliyun captcha V3 risk control).

// --- evasion 1 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, propName, handlerGetterSetter) => {\n    const ownPropertyDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName), handler = { ...ownPropertyDescriptor };\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.get !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.get, nativeFn);\n    }\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.set !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.set;\n      handler.set = function(newValue) {\n        handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(-1)[0]\n  })","replaceObjPathWithProxy":"(objPath, handler) => {\n    const { objName, propName } = utils.splitObjPath(objPath), obj = eval(objName);\n    return utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","execRecursively":"(obj = {}, typeFilter = [], fn) => {\n    function recurse(obj) {\n      for (const key in obj) {\n        if (obj[key] === void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return [...iterable].reduce((obj, [key, val]) => {\n        obj[key] = val;\n        return obj;\n      }, {});\n    }\n    return (Object.fromEntries || fromEntries)(Object.entries(fnObj).filter(([key, value]) => typeof value === \"function\").map(([key, value]) => [key, value.toString()]));\n  }","materializeFns":"(fnStrObj = { hello: \"() => 'world'\" }) => {\n    return Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils) => {\n        if (!window.chrome)\n          Object.defineProperty(window, \"chrome\", {\n            writable: !0,\n            enumerable: !0,\n            configurable: !1,\n            value: {}\n          });\n        if (\"app\" in window.chrome)\n          return;\n        const makeError = {\n          ErrorInInvocation: (fn) => {\n            const err = TypeError(`Error in invocation of app.${fn}()`);\n            return utils.stripErrorWithAnchor(err, `at ${fn} (eval at <anonymous>`);\n          }\n        }, STATIC_DATA = JSON.parse(`\n{\n  \"isInstalled\": false,\n  \"InstallState\": {\n    \"DISABLED\": \"disabled\",\n    \"INSTALLED\": \"installed\",\n    \"NOT_INSTALLED\": \"not_installed\"\n  },\n  \"RunningState\": {\n    \"CANNOT_RUN\": \"cannot_run\",\n    \"READY_TO_RUN\": \"ready_to_run\",\n    \"RUNNING\": \"running\"\n  }\n}\n        `.trim());\n        window.chrome.app = {\n          ...STATIC_DATA,\n          get isInstalled() {\n            return !1;\n          },\n          getDetails: function getDetails() {\n            if (arguments.length)\n              throw makeError.ErrorInInvocation(\"getDetails\");\n            return null;\n          },\n          getIsInstalled: function getDetails() {\n            if (arguments.length)\n              throw makeError.ErrorInInvocation(\"getIsInstalled\");\n            return !1;\n          },\n          runningState: function getDetails() {\n            if (arguments.length)\n              throw makeError.ErrorInInvocation(\"runningState\");\n            return \"cannot_run\";\n          }\n        };\n        utils.patchToStringNested(window.chrome.app);\n      }";
const _args = [];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);
utils.init();
eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 2 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, propName, handlerGetterSetter) => {\n    const ownPropertyDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName), handler = { ...ownPropertyDescriptor };\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.get !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.get, nativeFn);\n    }\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.set !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.set;\n      handler.set = function(newValue) {\n        handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(-1)[0]\n  })","replaceObjPathWithProxy":"(objPath, handler) => {\n    const { objName, propName } = utils.splitObjPath(objPath), obj = eval(objName);\n    return utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","execRecursively":"(obj = {}, typeFilter = [], fn) => {\n    function recurse(obj) {\n      for (const key in obj) {\n        if (obj[key] === void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return [...iterable].reduce((obj, [key, val]) => {\n        obj[key] = val;\n        return obj;\n      }, {});\n    }\n    return (Object.fromEntries || fromEntries)(Object.entries(fnObj).filter(([key, value]) => typeof value === \"function\").map(([key, value]) => [key, value.toString()]));\n  }","materializeFns":"(fnStrObj = { hello: \"() => 'world'\" }) => {\n    return Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils) => {\n        if (!window.chrome)\n          Object.defineProperty(window, \"chrome\", {\n            writable: !0,\n            enumerable: !0,\n            configurable: !1,\n            value: {}\n          });\n        if (\"csi\" in window.chrome)\n          return;\n        if (!window.performance || !window.performance.timing)\n          return;\n        const { timing } = window.performance;\n        window.chrome.csi = function() {\n          return {\n            onloadT: timing.domContentLoadedEventEnd,\n            startE: timing.navigationStart,\n            pageT: Date.now() - timing.navigationStart,\n            tran: 15\n          };\n        };\n        utils.patchToString(window.chrome.csi);\n      }";
const _args = [];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);
utils.init();
eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 3 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, propName, handlerGetterSetter) => {\n    const ownPropertyDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName), handler = { ...ownPropertyDescriptor };\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.get !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.get, nativeFn);\n    }\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.set !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.set;\n      handler.set = function(newValue) {\n        handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(-1)[0]\n  })","replaceObjPathWithProxy":"(objPath, handler) => {\n    const { objName, propName } = utils.splitObjPath(objPath), obj = eval(objName);\n    return utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","execRecursively":"(obj = {}, typeFilter = [], fn) => {\n    function recurse(obj) {\n      for (const key in obj) {\n        if (obj[key] === void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return [...iterable].reduce((obj, [key, val]) => {\n        obj[key] = val;\n        return obj;\n      }, {});\n    }\n    return (Object.fromEntries || fromEntries)(Object.entries(fnObj).filter(([key, value]) => typeof value === \"function\").map(([key, value]) => [key, value.toString()]));\n  }","materializeFns":"(fnStrObj = { hello: \"() => 'world'\" }) => {\n    return Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils, { opts }) => {\n        if (!window.chrome)\n          Object.defineProperty(window, \"chrome\", {\n            writable: !0,\n            enumerable: !0,\n            configurable: !1,\n            value: {}\n          });\n        if (\"loadTimes\" in window.chrome)\n          return;\n        if (!window.performance || !window.performance.timing || !window.PerformancePaintTiming)\n          return;\n        const { performance } = window, ntEntryFallback = {\n          nextHopProtocol: \"h2\",\n          type: \"other\"\n        }, protocolInfo = {\n          get connectionInfo() {\n            return (performance.getEntriesByType(\"navigation\")[0] || ntEntryFallback).nextHopProtocol;\n          },\n          get npnNegotiatedProtocol() {\n            const ntEntry = performance.getEntriesByType(\"navigation\")[0] || ntEntryFallback;\n            return [\"h2\", \"hq\"].includes(ntEntry.nextHopProtocol) ? ntEntry.nextHopProtocol : \"unknown\";\n          },\n          get navigationType() {\n            return (performance.getEntriesByType(\"navigation\")[0] || ntEntryFallback).type;\n          },\n          get wasAlternateProtocolAvailable() {\n            return !1;\n          },\n          get wasFetchedViaSpdy() {\n            const ntEntry = performance.getEntriesByType(\"navigation\")[0] || ntEntryFallback;\n            return [\"h2\", \"hq\"].includes(ntEntry.nextHopProtocol);\n          },\n          get wasNpnNegotiated() {\n            const ntEntry = performance.getEntriesByType(\"navigation\")[0] || ntEntryFallback;\n            return [\"h2\", \"hq\"].includes(ntEntry.nextHopProtocol);\n          }\n        }, { timing } = window.performance;\n        function toFixed(num, fixed) {\n          var re = new RegExp(\"^-?\\\\d+(?:.\\\\d{0,\" + (fixed || -1) + \"})?\");\n          return num.toString().match(re)[0];\n        }\n        const timingInfo = {\n          get firstPaintAfterLoadTime() {\n            return 0;\n          },\n          get requestTime() {\n            return timing.navigationStart / 1000;\n          },\n          get startLoadTime() {\n            return timing.navigationStart / 1000;\n          },\n          get commitLoadTime() {\n            return timing.responseStart / 1000;\n          },\n          get finishDocumentLoadTime() {\n            return timing.domContentLoadedEventEnd / 1000;\n          },\n          get finishLoadTime() {\n            return timing.loadEventEnd / 1000;\n          },\n          get firstPaintTime() {\n            const fpEntry = performance.getEntriesByType(\"paint\")[0] || {\n              startTime: timing.loadEventEnd / 1000\n            };\n            return toFixed((fpEntry.startTime + performance.timeOrigin) / 1000, 3);\n          }\n        };\n        window.chrome.loadTimes = function() {\n          return {\n            ...protocolInfo,\n            ...timingInfo\n          };\n        };\n        utils.patchToString(window.chrome.loadTimes);\n      }";
const _args = [{"opts":{}}];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);
utils.init();
eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 4 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n const _mainFunction = "(utils, { opts, STATIC_DATA }) => {\n        if (!window.chrome)\n          Object.defineProperty(window, \"chrome\", {\n            writable: !0,\n            enumerable: !0,\n            configurable: !1,\n            value: {}\n          });\n        const existsAlready = \"runtime\" in window.chrome, isNotSecure = !window.location.protocol.startsWith(\"https\");\n        if (existsAlready || isNotSecure && !opts.runOnInsecureOrigins)\n          return;\n        window.chrome.runtime = {\n          ...STATIC_DATA,\n          get id() {\n            return;\n          },\n          connect: null,\n          sendMessage: null\n        };\n        const makeCustomRuntimeErrors = (preamble, method, extensionId) => ({\n          NoMatchingSignature: TypeError(preamble + \"No matching signature.\"),\n          MustSpecifyExtensionID: TypeError(preamble + `${method} called from a webpage must specify an Extension ID (string) for its first argument.`),\n          InvalidExtensionID: TypeError(preamble + `Invalid extension id: '${extensionId}'`)\n        }), isValidExtensionID = (str) => str.length === 32 && str.toLowerCase().match(/^[a-p]+$/), sendMessageHandler = {\n          apply: function(target, ctx, args) {\n            const [extensionId, options, responseCallback] = args || [], Errors = makeCustomRuntimeErrors(\"Error in invocation of runtime.sendMessage(optional string extensionId, any message, optional object options, optional function responseCallback): \", \"chrome.runtime.sendMessage()\", extensionId), noArguments = args.length === 0, tooManyArguments = args.length > 4;\n            if (noArguments || tooManyArguments || options && typeof options !== \"object\" || responseCallback && typeof responseCallback !== \"function\")\n              throw Errors.NoMatchingSignature;\n            if (args.length < 2)\n              throw Errors.MustSpecifyExtensionID;\n            if (typeof extensionId !== \"string\")\n              throw Errors.NoMatchingSignature;\n            if (!isValidExtensionID(extensionId))\n              throw Errors.InvalidExtensionID;\n            return;\n          }\n        };\n        utils.mockWithProxy(window.chrome.runtime, \"sendMessage\", function sendMessage() {}, sendMessageHandler);\n        const connectHandler = {\n          apply: function(target, ctx, args) {\n            const [extensionId, connectInfo] = args || [], Errors = makeCustomRuntimeErrors(\"Error in invocation of runtime.connect(optional string extensionId, optional object connectInfo): \", \"chrome.runtime.connect()\", extensionId), noArguments = args.length === 0, emptyStringArgument = args.length === 1 && extensionId === \"\";\n            if (noArguments || emptyStringArgument)\n              throw Errors.MustSpecifyExtensionID;\n            if (args.length > 2 || connectInfo && typeof connectInfo !== \"object\")\n              throw Errors.NoMatchingSignature;\n            const extensionIdIsString = typeof extensionId === \"string\";\n            if (extensionIdIsString && extensionId === \"\")\n              throw Errors.MustSpecifyExtensionID;\n            if (extensionIdIsString && !isValidExtensionID(extensionId))\n              throw Errors.InvalidExtensionID;\n            const validateConnectInfo = (ci) => {\n              if (args.length > 1)\n                throw Errors.NoMatchingSignature;\n              if (Object.keys(ci).length === 0)\n                throw Errors.MustSpecifyExtensionID;\n              Object.entries(ci).forEach(([k, v]) => {\n                if (![\"name\", \"includeTlsChannelId\"].includes(k))\n                  throw TypeError(`Error in invocation of runtime.connect(optional string extensionId, optional object connectInfo): Unexpected property: '${k}'.`);\n                const MismatchError = (propName, expected, found) => TypeError(`Error in invocation of runtime.connect(optional string extensionId, optional object connectInfo): Error at property '${propName}': Invalid type: expected ${expected}, found ${found}.`);\n                if (k === \"name\" && typeof v !== \"string\")\n                  throw MismatchError(k, \"string\", typeof v);\n                if (k === \"includeTlsChannelId\" && typeof v !== \"boolean\")\n                  throw MismatchError(k, \"boolean\", typeof v);\n              });\n            };\n            if (typeof extensionId === \"object\") {\n              validateConnectInfo(extensionId);\n              throw Errors.MustSpecifyExtensionID;\n            }\n            return utils.patchToStringNested(makeConnectResponse());\n          }\n        };\n        utils.mockWithProxy(window.chrome.runtime, \"connect\", function connect() {}, connectHandler);\n        function makeConnectResponse() {\n          const onSomething = () => ({\n            addListener: function addListener() {},\n            dispatch: function dispatch() {},\n            hasListener: function hasListener() {},\n            hasListeners: function hasListeners() {\n              return !1;\n            },\n            removeListener: function removeListener() {}\n          });\n          return {\n            name: \"\",\n            sender: void 0,\n            disconnect: function disconnect() {},\n            onDisconnect: onSomething(),\n            onMessage: onSomething(),\n            postMessage: function postMessage() {\n              if (!arguments.length)\n                throw TypeError(\"Insufficient number of arguments.\");\n              throw Error(\"Attempting to use a disconnected port object\");\n            }\n          };\n        }\n      }";
const _args = [{"opts":{"runOnInsecureOrigins":true},"STATIC_DATA":{"OnInstalledReason":{"CHROME_UPDATE":"chrome_update","INSTALL":"install","SHARED_MODULE_UPDATE":"shared_module_update","UPDATE":"update"},"OnRestartRequiredReason":{"APP_UPDATE":"app_update","OS_UPDATE":"os_update","PERIODIC":"periodic"},"PlatformArch":{"ARM":"arm","ARM64":"arm64","MIPS":"mips","MIPS64":"mips64","X86_32":"x86-32","X86_64":"x86-64"},"PlatformNaclArch":{"ARM":"arm","MIPS":"mips","MIPS64":"mips64","X86_32":"x86-32","X86_64":"x86-64"},"PlatformOs":{"ANDROID":"android","CROS":"cros","LINUX":"linux","MAC":"mac","OPENBSD":"openbsd","WIN":"win"},"RequestUpdateCheckStatus":{"NO_UPDATE":"no_update","THROTTLED":"throttled","UPDATE_AVAILABLE":"update_available"}}}];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);

eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 5 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, propName, handlerGetterSetter) => {\n    const ownPropertyDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName), handler = { ...ownPropertyDescriptor };\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.get !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.get, nativeFn);\n    }\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.set !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.set;\n      handler.set = function(newValue) {\n        handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(-1)[0]\n  })","replaceObjPathWithProxy":"(objPath, handler) => {\n    const { objName, propName } = utils.splitObjPath(objPath), obj = eval(objName);\n    return utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","execRecursively":"(obj = {}, typeFilter = [], fn) => {\n    function recurse(obj) {\n      for (const key in obj) {\n        if (obj[key] === void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return [...iterable].reduce((obj, [key, val]) => {\n        obj[key] = val;\n        return obj;\n      }, {});\n    }\n    return (Object.fromEntries || fromEntries)(Object.entries(fnObj).filter(([key, value]) => typeof value === \"function\").map(([key, value]) => [key, value.toString()]));\n  }","materializeFns":"(fnStrObj = { hello: \"() => 'world'\" }) => {\n    return Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils, opts) => {\n        try {\n          const addContentWindowProxy = (iframe) => {\n            const contentWindowProxy = {\n              get(target, key) {\n                if (key === \"self\")\n                  return this;\n                if (key === \"frameElement\")\n                  return iframe;\n                if (key === \"0\")\n                  return;\n                return Reflect.get(target, key);\n              }\n            };\n            if (!iframe.contentWindow) {\n              const proxy = new Proxy(window, contentWindowProxy);\n              Object.defineProperty(iframe, \"contentWindow\", {\n                get() {\n                  return proxy;\n                },\n                set(newValue) {\n                  return newValue;\n                },\n                enumerable: !0,\n                configurable: !1\n              });\n            }\n          }, handleIframeCreation = (target, thisArg, args) => {\n            const iframe = target.apply(thisArg, args), _iframe = iframe, _srcdoc = _iframe.srcdoc;\n            Object.defineProperty(iframe, \"srcdoc\", {\n              configurable: !0,\n              get: function() {\n                return _srcdoc;\n              },\n              set: function(newValue) {\n                addContentWindowProxy(this);\n                Object.defineProperty(iframe, \"srcdoc\", {\n                  configurable: !1,\n                  writable: !1,\n                  value: _srcdoc\n                });\n                _iframe.srcdoc = newValue;\n              }\n            });\n            return iframe;\n          };\n          (() => {\n            const createElementHandler = {\n              get(target, key) {\n                return Reflect.get(target, key);\n              },\n              apply: function(target, thisArg, args) {\n                if (!(args && args.length && `${args[0]}`.toLowerCase() === \"iframe\"))\n                  return target.apply(thisArg, args);\n                else\n                  return handleIframeCreation(target, thisArg, args);\n              }\n            };\n            utils.replaceWithProxy(document, \"createElement\", createElementHandler);\n          })();\n        } catch (err) {}\n      }";
const _args = [];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);
utils.init();
eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 6 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n const _mainFunction = "(utils) => {\n        const parseInput = (arg) => {\n          const [mime, codecStr] = arg.trim().split(\";\");\n          let codecs = [];\n          if (codecStr && codecStr.includes('codecs=\"'))\n            codecs = codecStr.trim().replace('codecs=\"', \"\").replace('\"', \"\").trim().split(\",\").filter((x) => !!x).map((x) => x.trim());\n          return {\n            mime,\n            codecStr,\n            codecs\n          };\n        }, canPlayType = {\n          apply: function(target, ctx, args) {\n            if (!args || !args.length)\n              return target.apply(ctx, args);\n            const { mime, codecs } = parseInput(args[0]);\n            if (mime === \"video/mp4\") {\n              if (codecs.includes(\"avc1.42E01E\"))\n                return \"probably\";\n            }\n            if (mime === \"audio/x-m4a\" && !codecs.length)\n              return \"maybe\";\n            if (mime === \"audio/aac\" && !codecs.length)\n              return \"probably\";\n            return target.apply(ctx, args);\n          }\n        };\n        utils.replaceWithProxy(HTMLMediaElement.prototype, \"canPlayType\", canPlayType);\n      }";

  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
