// --- evasion 8 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, propName, handlerGetterSetter) => {\n    const ownPropertyDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName), handler = { ...ownPropertyDescriptor };\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.get !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.get, nativeFn);\n    }\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.set !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.set;\n      handler.set = function(newValue) {\n        handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(-1)[0]\n  })","replaceObjPathWithProxy":"(objPath, handler) => {\n    const { objName, propName } = utils.splitObjPath(objPath), obj = eval(objName);\n    return utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","execRecursively":"(obj = {}, typeFilter = [], fn) => {\n    function recurse(obj) {\n      for (const key in obj) {\n        if (obj[key] === void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return [...iterable].reduce((obj, [key, val]) => {\n        obj[key] = val;\n        return obj;\n      }, {});\n    }\n    return (Object.fromEntries || fromEntries)(Object.entries(fnObj).filter(([key, value]) => typeof value === \"function\").map(([key, value]) => [key, value.toString()]));\n  }","materializeFns":"(fnStrObj = { hello: \"() => 'world'\" }) => {\n    return Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils, { opts }) => {\n        const languages = opts.languages.length ? opts.languages : [\"en-US\", \"en\"];\n        utils.replaceGetterWithProxy(Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator), \"languages\", utils.makeHandler().getterValue(Object.freeze([...languages])));\n      }";
const _args = [{"opts":{"languages":[]}}];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);
utils.init();
eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 9 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, propName, handlerGetterSetter) => {\n    const ownPropertyDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName), handler = { ...ownPropertyDescriptor };\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.get !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.get, nativeFn);\n    }\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.set !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.set;\n      handler.set = function(newValue) {\n        handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(-1)[0]\n  })","replaceObjPathWithProxy":"(objPath, handler) => {\n    const { objName, propName } = utils.splitObjPath(objPath), obj = eval(objName);\n    return utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","execRecursively":"(obj = {}, typeFilter = [], fn) => {\n    function recurse(obj) {\n      for (const key in obj) {\n        if (obj[key] === void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return [...iterable].reduce((obj, [key, val]) => {\n        obj[key] = val;\n        return obj;\n      }, {});\n    }\n    return (Object.fromEntries || fromEntries)(Object.entries(fnObj).filter(([key, value]) => typeof value === \"function\").map(([key, value]) => [key, value.toString()]));\n  }","materializeFns":"(fnStrObj = { hello: \"() => 'world'\" }) => {\n    return Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils, opts) => {\n        const isSecure = document.location.protocol.startsWith(\"https\");\n        if (isSecure)\n          utils.replaceGetterWithProxy(Notification, \"permission\", {\n            apply() {\n              return \"default\";\n            }\n          });\n        if (!isSecure) {\n          const handler = {\n            apply(target, ctx, args) {\n              const param = (args || [])[0];\n              if (!(param && param.name && param.name === \"notifications\"))\n                return utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n              return Promise.resolve(Object.setPrototypeOf({\n                state: \"denied\",\n                onchange: null\n              }, PermissionStatus.prototype));\n            }\n          };\n          utils.replaceWithProxy(Permissions.prototype, \"query\", handler);\n        }\n      }";
const _args = [{}];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);
utils.init();
eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 10 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n       err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj,   handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(-1)[0]\n  })","replaceObjPathWithProxy":"(objPath, handler) => {\n    const { objName, propName } = utils.splitObjPath(objPath), obj = eval(objName);\n    return utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","execRecursively":"(obj = {}, typeFilter = [], fn) => {\n    function recurse(obj) {\n      for (const key in obj) {\n        if (obj[key] === void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return [...iterable].reduce((obj, [key, val]) => {\n        obj[key] = val;\n        return obj;\n      }, {});\n    }\n    return (Object.fromEntries || fromEntries)(Object.entries(fnObj).filter(([key, value]) => typeof value === \"function\").map(([key, value]) => [key, value.toString()]));\n  }","materializeFns":"(fnStrObj = { hello: \"() => 'world'\" }) => {\n    return Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils, { fns, data }) => {\n        fns = utils.materializeFns(fns);\n        if (\"plugins\" in navigator && navigator.plugins.length)\n          return;\n        const mimeTypes = fns.generateMimeTypeArray(utils, fns)(data.mimeTypes), plugins = fns.generatePluginArray(utils, fns)(data.plugins);\n        for (const pluginData of data.plugins)\n          pluginData.__mimeTypes.forEach((type, index) => {\n            plugins[pluginData.name][index] = mimeTypes[type];\n            Object.defineProperty(plugins[pluginData.name], type, {\n              value: mimeTypes[type],\n              writable: !1,\n              enumerable: !1,\n              configurable: !0\n            });\n            Object.defineProperty(mimeTypes[type], \"enabledPlugin\", {\n              value: type === \"application/x-pnacl\" ? mimeTypes[\"application/x-nacl\"].enabledPlugin : new Proxy(plugins[pluginData.name], {}),\n              writable: !1,\n              enumerable: !1,\n              configurable: !0\n            });\n          });\n        const patchNavigator = (name, value) => utils.replaceProperty(Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator), name, {\n          get() {\n            return value;\n          }\n        });\n        patchNavigator(\"mimeTypes\", mimeTypes);\n        patchNavigator(\"plugins\", plugins);\n      }";
const _args = [{"fns":{"generateMimeTypeArray":"(utils, fns) => (mimeTypesData) => {\n    return fns.generateMagicArray(utils, fns)(mimeTypesData, MimeTypeArray.prototype, MimeType.prototype, \"type\");\n  }","generatePluginArray":"(utils, fns) => (pluginsData) => {\n    return fns.generateMagicArray(utils, fns)(pluginsData, PluginArray.prototype, Plugin.prototype, \"name\");\n  }","generateMagicArray":"(utils, fns) => function(dataArray = [], proto = MimeTypeArray.prototype, itemProto = MimeType.prototype, itemMainProp = \"type\") {\n    const defineProp = (obj, prop, value) => Object.defineProperty(obj, prop, {\n      value,\n      writable: !1,\n      enumerable: !1,\n      configurable: !0\n    }), makeItem = (data) => {\n      const item = {};\n      for (const prop of Object.keys(data)) {\n        if (prop.startsWith(\"__\"))\n          continue;\n        defineProp(item, prop, data[prop]);\n      }\n      return patchItem(item, data);\n    }, patchItem = (item, data) => {\n      let descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(item);\n      if (itemProto === Plugin.prototype)\n        descriptor = {\n          ...descriptor,\n          length: {\n            value: data.__mimeTypes.length,\n            writable: !1,\n            enumerable: !1,\n            configurable: !0\n          }\n        };\n      const obj = Object.create(itemProto, descriptor), blacklist = [...Object.keys(data), \"length\", \"enabledPlugin\"];\n      return new Proxy(obj, {\n        ownKeys(target) {\n          return Reflect.ownKeys(target).filter((k) => !blacklist.includes(k));\n        },\n        getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop) {\n          if (blacklist.includes(prop))\n            return;\n          return Reflect.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop);\n        }\n      });\n    }, magicArray = [];\n    dataArray.forEach((data) => {\n      magicArray.push(makeItem(data));\n    });\n    magicArray.forEach((entry) => {\n      defineProp(magicArray, entry[itemMainProp], entry);\n    });\n    const magicArrayObj = Object.create(proto, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(magicArray),\n      length: {\n        value: magicArray.length,\n        writable: !1,\n        enumerable: !1,\n        configurable: !0\n      }\n    }), functionMocks = fns.generateFunctionMocks(utils)(proto, itemMainProp, magicArray);\n    return new Proxy(magicArrayObj, {\n      get(target, key = \"\") {\n        if (key === \"item\")\n          return functionMocks.item;\n        if (key === \"namedItem\")\n          return functionMocks.namedItem;\n        if (proto === PluginArray.prototype && key === \"refresh\")\n          return functionMocks.refresh;\n        return utils.cache.Reflect.get(...arguments);\n      },\n      ownKeys(target) {\n        const keys = [], typeProps = magicArray.map((mt) => mt[itemMainProp]);\n        typeProps.forEach((_, i) => keys.push(`${i}`));\n        typeProps.forEach((propName) => keys.push(propName));\n        return keys;\n      },\n      getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop) {\n        if (prop === \"length\")\n          return;\n        return Reflect.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop);\n      }\n    });\n  }","generateFunctionMocks":"(utils) => (proto, itemMainProp, dataArray) => ({\n    item: utils.createProxy(proto.item, {\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        if (!args.length)\n          throw TypeError(`Failed to execute 'item' on '${proto[Symbol.toStringTag]}': 1 argument required, but only 0 present.`);\n        return (args[0] && Number.isInteger(Number(args[0])) ? dataArray[Number(args[0])] : dataArray[0]) || null;\n      }\n    }),\n    namedItem: utils.createProxy(proto.namedItem, {\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        if (!args.length)\n          throw TypeError(`Failed to execute 'namedItem' on '${proto[Symbol.toStringTag]}': 1 argument required, but only 0 present.`);\n        return dataArray.find((mt) => mt[itemMainProp] === args[0]) || null;\n      }\n    }),\n    refresh: proto.refresh ? utils.createProxy(proto.refresh, {\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        return;\n      }\n    }) : void 0\n  })"},"data":{"mimeTypes":[{"type":"application/pdf","suffixes":"pdf","description":"","__pluginName":"Chrome PDF Viewer"},{"type":"application/x-google-chrome-pdf","suffixes":"pdf","description":"Portable Document Format","__pluginName":"Chrome PDF Plugin"},{"type":"application/x-nacl","suffixes":"","description":"Native Client Executable","__pluginName":"Native Client"},{"type":"application/x-pnacl","suffixes":"","description":"Portable Native Client Executable","__pluginName":"Native Client"}],"plugins":[{"name":"Chrome PDF Plugin","filename":"internal-pdf-viewer","description":"Portable Document Format","__mimeTypes":["application/x-google-chrome-pdf"]},{"name":"Chrome PDF Viewer","filename":"mhjfbmdgcfjbbpaeojofohoefgiehjai","description":"","__mimeTypes":["application/pdf"]},{"name":"Native Client","filename":"internal-nacl-plugin","description":"","__mimeTypes":["application/x-nacl","application/x-pnacl"]}]}}];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);

// --- evasion 11 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `;\n            const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n            if (anchorIndex === -1)\n              return !1;\n            stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n            return stackArr.join(`\n`);\n          };\n          err.stack = err.stack.replace(\"at Object.toString (\", \"at Function.toString (\");\n          if ((err.stack || \"\").includes(\"at Function.toString (\")) {\n            err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, !1);\n            throw err;\n          }\n          err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stack);\n          throw err;\n        }\n      };\n    });\n    return newHandler;\n  }","stripErrorWithAnchor":"(err, anchor) => {\n    const stackArr = err.stack.split(`\n`), anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(anchor));\n    if (anchorIndex === -1)\n      return err;\n    stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex);\n    err.stack = stackArr.join(`\n`);\n    return err;\n  }","replaceProperty":"(obj, propName, descriptorOverrides = {}) => {\n    return Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, {\n      ...Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName) || {},\n      ...descriptorOverrides\n    });\n  }","preloadCache":"() => {\n    if (utils.cache)\n      return;\n    utils.cache = {\n      Reflect: {\n        get: Reflect.get.bind(Reflect),\n        apply: Reflect.apply.bind(Reflect)\n      },\n      nativeToStringStr: Function.toString + \"\"\n    };\n  }","makeNativeString":"(name = \"\") => {\n    return utils.cache.nativeToStringStr.replace(\"toString\", name || \"\");\n  }","patchToString":"(obj, str = \"\") => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === obj)\n          return str || utils.makeNativeString(obj.name);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","patchToStringNested":"(obj = {}) => {\n    return utils.execRecursively(obj, [\"function\"], utils.patchToString);\n  }","redirectToString":"(proxyObj, originalObj) => {\n    const handler = {\n      apply: function(target, ctx) {\n        if (ctx === Function.prototype.toString)\n          return utils.makeNativeString(\"toString\");\n        if (ctx === proxyObj) {\n          const fallback = () => originalObj && originalObj.name ? utils.makeNativeString(originalObj.name) : utils.makeNativeString(proxyObj.name);\n          return originalObj + \"\" || fallback();\n        }\n        if (typeof ctx > \"u\" || ctx === null)\n          return target.call(ctx);\n        if (!Object.getPrototypeOf(Function.prototype.toString).isPrototypeOf(ctx.toString))\n          return ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(Function.prototype, \"toString\", {\n      value: toStringProxy\n    });\n  }","replaceWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const originalObj = obj[propName], proxyObj = new Proxy(obj[propName], utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.redirectToString(proxyObj, originalObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterWithProxy":"(obj, propName, handler) => {\n    const fn = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName).get, fnStr = fn.toString(), proxyObj = new Proxy(fn, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { get: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj, fnStr);\n    return !0;\n  }","replaceGetterSetter":"(obj, propName, handlerGetterSetter) => {\n    const ownPropertyDescriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, propName), handler = { ...ownPropertyDescriptor };\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.get !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.get;\n      handler.get = function() {\n        return handlerGetterSetter.get.call(this, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.get, nativeFn);\n    }\n    if (handlerGetterSetter.set !== void 0) {\n      const nativeFn = ownPropertyDescriptor.set;\n      handler.set = function(newValue) {\n        handlerGetterSetter.set.call(this, newValue, nativeFn.bind(this));\n      };\n      utils.redirectToString(handler.set, nativeFn);\n    }\n    Object.defineProperty(obj, propName, handler);\n  }","mockWithProxy":"(obj, propName, pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.replaceProperty(obj, propName, { value: proxyObj });\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return !0;\n  }","createProxy":"(pseudoTarget, handler) => {\n    const proxyObj = new Proxy(pseudoTarget, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n    utils.patchToString(proxyObj);\n    return proxyObj;\n  }","splitObjPath":"(objPath) => ({\n    objName: objPath.split(\".\").slice(0, -1).join(\".\"),\n    propName: void 0)\n          continue;\n        if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === \"object\")\n          recurse(obj[key]);\n        else if (obj[key] && typeFilter.includes(typeof obj[key]))\n          fn.call(this, obj[key]);\n      }\n    }\n    recurse(obj);\n    return obj;\n  }","stringifyFns":"(fnObj = { hello: () => \"world\" }) => {\n    function fromEntries(iterable) {\n      return eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n const _mainFunction = "(utils, { opts }) => {\n        utils.replaceGetterWithProxy(Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator), \"vendor\", utils.makeHandler().getterValue(opts.vendor));\n      }";
const _args = [{"opts":{"vendor":"Google Inc."}}];

  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);

// --- evasion 12 ---
(() => {
        if (navigator.webdriver === !1)
          ;
        else if (navigator.webdriver === void 0)
          ;
        else
          delete Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator).webdriver;
      })();

// --- evasion 13 ---
(function(){
const _utilsFns = {"init":"() => {\n    utils.preloadCache();\n  }","stripProxyFromErrors":"(handler = {}) => {\n    const newHandler = {\n      setPrototypeOf: function(target, proto) {\n        if (proto === null)\n          throw TypeError(\"Cannot convert object to primitive value\");\n        if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto))\n          throw TypeError(\"Cyclic __proto__ value\");\n        return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto);\n      }\n    };\n    Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler).forEach((trap) => {\n      newHandler[trap] = function() {\n        try {\n          return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || []);\n        } catch (err) {\n          if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(\"at \"))\n            throw err;\n          const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = !0) => {\n            const blacklist = [\n              `at Reflect.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.${trap} `,\n              `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] `\n            ];\n            return err.stack.split(`\n`).filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine)).filter((line) => !blacklist.some((bl) => line.trim().startsWith(bl))).join(`\n`);\n          }, stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n            const stackArr = stack.split(`\n`);\n            anchor = anchor || ctx.toString();\n        return target.call(ctx);\n      }\n    }, toStringProxy = new Proxy(Function.prototype.toString, utils.stripProxyFromErrors(handler));\n Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(fnStrObj).map(([key, value]) => {\n      if (value.startsWith(\"function\"))\n        return [key, eval(`() => ${value}`)()];\n      else\n        return [key, eval(value)];\n    }));\n  }","makeHandler":"() => ({\n    getterValue: (value) => ({\n      apply(target, ctx, args) {\n        utils.cache.Reflect.apply(...arguments);\n        return value;\n      }\n    })\n  })","arrayEquals":"(array1, array2) => {\n    if (array1.length !== array2.length)\n      return !1;\n    for (let i = 0;i < array1.length; ++i)\n      if (array1[i] !== array2[i])\n        return !1;\n    return !0;\n  }","memoize":"(fn) => {\n    const cache = [];\n    return function(...args) {\n      if (!cache.some((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)))\n        cache.push({ key: args, value: fn.apply(this, args) });\n      return cache.find((c) => utils.arrayEquals(c.key, args)).value;\n    };\n  }"};
const _mainFunction = "(utils, opts) => {\n        const getParameterProxyHandler = {\n          apply: function(target, ctx, args) {\n            const param = (args || [])[0], result = utils.cache.Reflect.apply(target, ctx, args);\n            if (param === 37445)\n              return opts.vendor || \"Intel Inc.\";\n            if (param === 37446)\n              return opts.renderer || \"Intel Iris OpenGL Engine\";\n            return result;\n          }\n        }, addProxy = (obj, propName) => {\n          utils.replaceWithProxy(obj, propName, getParameterProxyHandler);\n        };\n        addProxy(WebGLRenderingContext.prototype, \"getParameter\");\n        addProxy(WebGL2RenderingContext.prototype, \"getParameter\");\n      }";
const _args = [{}];
const utils = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(_utilsFns).map(function(entry) { return [entry[0], eval(entry[1])]; })
);
utils.init();
eval(_mainFunction)(utils, ..._args);
})();

// --- evasion 14 ---
(() => {
        try {
          if (window.outerWidth && window.outerHeight)
            return;
          const windowFrame = 85;
          window.outerWidth = window.innerWidth;
          window.outerHeight = window.innerHeight + windowFrame;
        } catch (err) {}
      })();
})();
